clips.name: Neptune Statue
clips.description: Textured Neptune statue on dark stone floor, cinematic amber/cyan dual-light, slow majestic rotation, starfield. Epic intro.

clips.name: Liquid Neon Ribbon
clips.description: Chrome liquid ribbon with pink/magenta emission, fast spin, cyan + magenta rim lights. Abstract motion hero.

clips.name: Runic Obelisk
clips.description: Dark stone obelisk with glowing cyan runes, low-angle mystery framing, slow dramatic rotation. Fantasy/thriller intro.

clips.name: AI Injection
clips.description: Cyan cyber-emit treatment on the AI Injection Meshy asset. Fresnel-highlighted edges, reflective floor. Tech brand hero.

clips.name: Holographic Process
clips.description: Holographic glass panels with stacked diagrams, warm-orange rim + cyan fill, rotates slowly in deep space. Tech/product hero.

clips.name: Glass Cards Trio (pure Blender)
clips.description: Three floating glass cards with neon orange + cyan outlines, starfield, floor reflection. Baseline pure-Blender test.
